title: crocodilium verutum
intro: Crocodilium verutum, also known as the "toad's-spunge" or "toad's-spunge root", is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the relief of respiratory problems. Crocodilium verutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile treatment option for various health concerns.
